name: Five Nights at Freddy's: Help Wanted

reviews.review_description:
Best vr horror game of all time I recommend getting the second installment as well if you have beaten this one fully Good game!
The second installment is called help wanted
 2 Ollie dogwarts all you need to do is sve your game in the menu screen and exit from there

reviews.review_title: IF YOUR GOING TO BUY LISTEN full review
reviews.review_description:
Amazing honestly it makes you feel like you are THE SECURITY GUARD no matter what vr 3 3S 2 PRO 
 it doesn’t matter graphics are insane and honestly funny in a good way and what I mean is the animatronics walking randomly in hallways NOT A BUG like in FNAF 2 my recommended age is honestly 10+ and u might think why it says 12+ well the horror is perfect no blood but jump scares an horror and DLC IS SOOO WORTH IT but overall I love it so far ZERO BUGS from what I’ve played kinda hard the part where you fix the vents scariest one in all of help wanted specifically ennard and battery last 2 to 3.5 hours depends and bro if u play nonstop get a life 2 to 3.5 hours is amazing more is bad for ur brain so trust me with the battery life its pretty good for a VR game graphics are a 8.9 out of 10 still AMAZING just help wanted 2 has better btw help wanted 2 is worth it but if u dont have help wanted 1 no BUY 1 DLC is optional but I highly recommend specially that mode of fnaf 1 with the boarded doors and nightmare animatronics so in my opinion worth it I get bored  in 3 hours my fave mode is FNAF 2 second is parts and service im going to stop spoiling the modes so overall 9.8/10 im sorry if its too much yapping but worth it if u want TRUE opinion DLC is a 9.7/10 and its only 9.99$ game and dlc is 39.98 exactly  its not repetitive honestly you never know when animatronics are moving u might get surprised trust me jumpscares are scary recommended volum 6 out if 10 TRUST ME I KNOW WHAT HAPPENS WHEN ITS FULL VOLUME if u liked this u might like help wanted 2 ( NOT BUYING THIS means your are missing out and no wonder its top seller) so anyways BUH BYE WAS THAT THE BITE OF 87! FNAF REFERENCE ok FR bye

It's 2026 steel wool could upgrade the graphics on meta quest 3 at least, the textures are not readable mostly (on some boxes that are in FNAF 1 or snacks we get as prizes for winning mini games), some models of animatronics are just weird not every animatronic because a lot of them are fine. It would be cool if steel wool would give us graphics update on meta quest because the pcvr version not surprisingly is very good. Also it would be cool if they would fix some bugs like the one that makes Springtrap in FNAF 3 just stuck in place by entering the closed vent infinitely or in FNAF 4 mini games the player should not grab the doors with the same hand he using the flashlight, because it's annoying having doors so close to you because the game thinks when we using flashlight by holding grab button we also holding doors. Steel wool please 🥺

This is honestly a 10/10 game there is so much good about this. But why in Help Wanted 2 did you make it about security breach and stuff. It would’ve been cooler to add the games you didn’t have like fnaf 5, 6, and security breach. I personally thought it was cooler to actually go into the office you play in when your playing on pc mobile etc. also I know Secret of the Mimic is out on PSVR2 but could you add it to meta. That would be really cool. Anyway this is a very fun game would recommend to any fnaf player. And yeah. Anyway lemma tell you the entire lore of fnaf.
William afton teams up with Henry Emily to make a pizza place for kids to have fun, but William afton goes ape and goes into the spring lock suit that he made himself, to lure kids into backrooms and murdering them. It was all going well until he murdered his co worker Henry Emily’s kid Henry Emily became depressed and also got mad. But he didn’t know it was William. Then after a couple more murders and a new something happens that barely changed William, his kid Evan gets his frontal lobe bit off by Fredbear, and so he is forced to make a new restaurant, called “Freddy Fazbears Pizza” With Freddy Bonny Chica and foxy. He keeps murdering but he doesn’t know where to hide the bodies. So he stuffs them into the animatronics. At this point Henry Emily has gottten suspicious of William and thinks he might be the one. Then William’s other kid Elizabeth gets taken and murdered by his own creation. All of this gets Freddy’s shut down. But one day years later, William goes back to destroy the animatronics. When doing so the spirits woke up and chased him into the safe room where he got into a spring lock suit and gets springlocked, locking him in the suit for the rest of his life. Then in the events of FNAF 1 you play as Something Shmidt. After all of the stuff that happens there, he quits. In Fnaf 2 you play as Michael Afton, William afton older son. But this one is special. He doesn’t quit after Fnaf 2. But during Fnaf 3 he reunited with his father, but Michael is furious that William did everything he did murdering and honestly causing his brothers and sisters death. So in the end he burns down the building with William inside. During Fnaf 4 you play as Evan, aka the crying child. This is more of a recap of Fredbears. But he’s in a coma and in that coma he sees all of the Freddy gang but in a nightmare form, and he has to survive them. And in the end he basically watches himself die again. But he is released from this nightmare with death. Fnaf 5 bring Michael to sister location where he is looking for his sister Elizabeth but in the process he gets tricked by Ennard and dies afterwards, or does he. In Fnaf 6 Michael traps everybody from Circus Baby Funtime Freddy scraptrap (William) and in the end he burns all of them killing Michael William and Elizabeth releasing them all. But William gets trapped in UCN which is eternal hell and he is trapped with no way out. And I’m not getting into security breach. But please like this it took me FOREVER to .

I have loved FNaF for 5 years now and have played almost every game but I have always wanted to play a VR FNaF so I recently got this game and I have almost beat all the levels already.
FNaF is always gonna be a superior game and probably one of the top horror games ever and I hope that this game gets a lot more players
I love Scott Cawthon (I can’t remember how to spell his name (so sorry)) because he has such an iconic place in the horror game franchise.
I know every little bit of FNaF lore (except for some of the newer stuff) and I can tell anyone, anything about it.

This game has extremely good models and really scary which i love fnaf it is my favorite horror  game and Also my first favorite horror game and poppy playtime is my second one but poppy playtime got to learn from fnaf  . The graphics are great and so keep going to make fnaf games Scott and steel wool

Am not not a fan and one of my friend got this game without me knowing and I want a refund on this game if I could. Yes I tried the game and I really don’t like it so if I could get a refund I would appreciate it.

reviews.review_title: ITS SO SCARY, I LOVE IT
reviews.review_description: Its so good might be the best horror game I've ever played. This game is scary, TOO SCARY to the point someone will soil there pants

Well… A few years ago, I was absolutely hooked on FNAF. I thought it was the greatest game of all time. Then, that just faded. A couple years later, I was browsing the Meta Store and found this game. I had nearly forgotten FNAF existed, but I remembered the good times I had with it, so I bought it. I booted it up, and… JUMPSCARE, JUMPSCARE, JUMPSCARE. Dude, I don’t know if I just suck at it, but I had to change my pants every 5 nights. I love the game, still reminiscing of the older games. It’s a good game. Play it.

It’s a scary immersive experience it really freaked me out a lot and it’s a very fun game. The mini games are like really scary especially the glitch trap animatronic that randomly appears in it like a glitch that really freaked me out. ￼
Well this game is good and boring after all I mean it’s not boring if you’re playing it for the first time then it’s fun but like 3 hours later it’s just boring

It is fun at first but then it starts to get boring and I am a big fnaf fan and when I tried to refund it it said request not approved. I would recommend getting battle talent or blade and sorcery. I really want my money back in quest cash and as it is a $30 game it still has a $10 add on. And when I saw that I could refund it and get battle talent it didn’t give my money back! And now I am stuck with a game that I don’t like. Please give my money back. I am very mad and just to say there are better games out there.

So... after I bought the game, I had a shot. And it is kinda scary, pretty scary. Also, I looked at 1 star reviews. Alright, 1. If the game doesn't load, return it. If it's bad, return it, you would have liked it if you already had over 2 hours 3. Too hard, skill issue man 4. Too scary, ITS LITERALLY FNAF WHAT DO YOU EXPECT??? 5. Small room, true but you can tidy up the place... or move spots. So yeah, not much of an issue. Fun.
One of the the best fnaf game I've played BTW steel wool. Please make help wanted 3 i have ideas for it

The only thing that is pretty hard is the nightmare with funtime Freddy with Bonbon and Bonnet, but challenges are  fun. it is just like the games but better  because it really scary and realistic if I could I would rate it 1000000/ 10 super fun  really recommended by me

This game is pretty much the scariest game you’ll find on the platform but I bought the dlc with the main game and within a week it just made me have to buy the DLC again even tho I bought it Alr but besides that is good
I got this game 2 or 3 years ago but I’m scared to play it because I’m scared of five nights at Freddy’s
The game is to hard
When I first started the game it was terrifying and I thought it was the most scary game in vr but that was until I played crawlspace vr and broke my headset because I threw it across my room
I beat pizza party and got all tapes\tapes coins and i try to get secret ending and the game just refreshes, other then that the game is fun
this is my first help wanted game and its so GOOD i like it. U got to download it NOW!!!!
I have never seen a horror game as good as this.
I love all the gamemood that this game has to provide and it’s super scary it makes me soil my pants everyone should buy this game

reviews.review_title: Don’t buy it if ur sensitive to vr
reviews.review_description: I got this game thinking it was going to be not to to scary but after playing it I thought it was to scary for me!!!!

I've played this so much but the lobby is enough to make me flabbergasted if only we were able to move around the entire map oh and btw I would downgrade this because of the bug with like the green hologram rabbit appearing sometimes but the mini games persuaded me not to notice

The game is very fun and also scary and adds a lot to the lore but it will NEVER save my progress, I’ve tried everything and it won’t work rendering the game almost unplayable. Not to mention the graphics aren’t the best. It’s a shame because the game would be fun if it wasn’t broken

reviews.review_title: I almost died….ITS FRICKIN FUN THO
reviews.review_description: The thing is I fell out my chair and yeah it hurt the game in vr is so real me being a big HUGE FNAF FAN I love this 100% think this will help me make views on YouTube videos. But anyways LOVE IT LOVE THE JOB NEVER GONNA BE UNEMPLOYED!
I thought this was gonna be another trashy Steelwool game not remembering the other ones at all,but it is much more.
if you are a fnaf fan then p this is the game for you. it has fnaf 1-3 in vr and some other cool mini games.
Do not AND I MEAN DO NOT peak out of the door in fnaf 1
It was so good bro like I sharted every 5 seconds it was so good

We have tried everything to get it to save and nothing works. We tried to our storage settings, playing around with other setting and nothing works. It’s a fun game but we can’t save anything. Hopefully they get it fixed soon or I may have to request a refund and delete the game. It’s not worth playing if you have to restart your progress every time you exit the game.

I have had this game for at least a year now and the first time I played i didn't think it was scary until I ACTUALLY played it and my legs were shaking. This game has all you could ask for except the phantom animatronics they could be a bit better. WILL SATISFY YOUR FNAF PHASE

This game is so fun! It has lore and a bunch of secrets to explore. The only thing I don’t like about this game is just something wrong with my headset. There are some parts in the curse of dreadbear DLC, in the pirate ride mini-game. Some of the targets don’t work. Also some cassette tapes aren’t showing up, and the same thing with the coins. I need to know how to fix it.

When i first started it didn't seem that scary and I've never played fanaf so this was my first time and I just bought it because it seemed kind of fun but I underestimated it. There was the most scariest and hardest level for me and it was the fun time foxy in the dark. But overall the game is amazing and I recommending getting it especially if you like a good horror story because the end is wild!!!

I got this game today and when I left to go eat my progress got wiped clean. Please add an auto save or a save and quit to not have this. I feel like I got cheated out. I highly recommend to not play this game if you hate being scammed of your money.
It has a bunch of cool modes and it looks just like original fnaf the gameplay is great and the prize counter feature is cool and it has a DLC
.Both of the games are🔥  but the jump scares  should have more animation
Honestly it is a very old game for vr and one or the best games on ver I highly recommend if looking for better graphics get help wanted 2

How do they so scary and fun at the same time and extra games especially Parts and services first time I played I was to scared and that was a year ago but now its still scary but not as much and I love the franchise especially Fnaf 2 which was my favorite on mobile ￼￼￼ ￼ ￼

I tell you what… you can’t beat the vr experience in terms of immersion. It’s terrifying to look to your left and just see a 7 foot animatronic looking down at you. If you want to be scared, this is the game to do it.
It’s okay but there are not a lot of game options while help wanted 2 has a lot of options

This game actually scared me and the lore and endings and secrets really add on to that fnaf feeling and transfers you into the fnaf world in so many different games! Also the fnaf dlc is really cool too, I recommend both! (Also help wanted 2 is a banger too)

reviews.review_title: RECOMMEND THIS GAME TO HORROR LOVERS
reviews.review_description: This game can be very good, and is very grindy and I like that about it, since it is very fun and pretty scary, so fnaf hw is very great for horror lovers! Recommend this game to all people 12+ kids who want horror and fun!

Probably the best horror game on quest. The graphics are peak, the character models are scary, and you feel like a fazbear employee when playing. (However I absolutely hate the plushbabys, Scott, please remove them)

Gotta say this is the best game I've played since roblox the graphics aren't that good but it really depends on what headset you have i have 3s and the graphics are still pretty good fnaf 2 is my fav then 3 so this is the best game EVER
When I was hooked on FNAF this game was PEAK for thriller vibes and scary jumpscares. Everybody knows that FNAF is scary but terrifying in vr.
If you are a big fnaf fan then BUY IT it's peak thats all
Add multiplayer

reviews.review_title: One of my favourite VR games
reviews.review_description: This game is amazing! I used to have this on PS4 5 years ago which ultimately led me to interest FNaF and VR. The atmosphere, and fear factor in some levels like night terrors help build up that initial fear expected from a fnaf game. Knocked it out of the park.

This was my first FNaF game and it's GREAT.
The graphics are actually pretty good, except for some textures which are really blurry but ist only the food. Parts and service is great.



"Is this where you wanna be? I just don't get it, why would you want to stay?"
Genuinely terrifying. Imagine looking to your left or right and see a 8 foot animatronic staring down at you.
game is awesome but when i try to do the mangle vent repair level it kicks me out the game please help
FNAF Help Wanted is an incredible experience because it's not only heaps of fun but it can be challenging and terrifying too. Also please add FNAF Help Wanted 3.

It is a fantastic FNAF experience but the only complaint I have is that since my VR set is different, the graphics are kinda crappy, and also the flashlight in the plush baby level doesn't have a wide enough flash and it puts a lot of pressure on me.

when i got money for christmas, i didnt know what game to buy but then i saw it, help wanted i bought and its a best game i played in months. This was the game i exactly was looking for im currently on night 4 fnaf 1 and if you think there arent any good games on meta horizon, buy this
It's a good game in all but the only thang I don't like about it is THE PLUSHBABY STAGE THATS THE HARDEST STAGE EVER
Its was fun the minigames were good and there were 3 fnaf games built in it best purches but the grafix were not good but still fun in 2026
